name: DistanceConverter
summary: The DistanceConverter class converts types to and from the distance type.

constructors.name: DistanceConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DistanceConverter class

methods.name: CanConvertFrom
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the source type to the distance type.

methods.name: CanConvertTo
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the distance type to the destination type.

methods.name: ConvertFrom
methods.summary: Converts an object from the given culture to the distance type.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.summary: Converts an object from the distance type to the given destination type.
